# thriiv Digital

> thriiv Digital is a web design and digital growth agency based in North Wollongong, NSW, Australia, serving businesses across Wollongong and the Illawarra region. We build fast, mobile-first websites and run local SEO, AI-search optimisation (AEO), Google & Meta Ads, and lead-automation services for local businesses. No lock-in contracts — clients own their website, domain and data from day one.

## Services

- [Website Design & Development](https://thriivdigital.com.au/wollongong-web-design/): Custom-built, mobile-first websites for Wollongong and Illawarra businesses, designed to load fast, rank locally, and convert visitors into enquiries.
- [SEO + AEO](https://thriivdigital.com.au/wollongong-seo/): Local search engine optimisation and answer-engine optimisation — ranking in Google organic results, the Google Maps 3-pack, and AI assistants such as ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, and Perplexity.
- [Google Ads & Meta Ads](https://thriivdigital.com.au/wollongong-ads/): Paid search and social advertising management with hyper-local targeting, dedicated landing pages, and lead-quality tracking.

Also offered, not yet with a dedicated page: thriiv Reviews (reputation and review generation), thriiv Lead Automation (missed-call text-back and instant lead capture), and thriiv Care & Maintenance (hosting, security, ongoing updates).

## Proof

- [Client Results & Case Studies](https://thriivdigital.com.au/results/): Real outcomes from website builds, local SEO campaigns, and lead-automation rollouts for Illawarra businesses.
- [GrowthCDS Case Study](https://thriivdigital.com.au/case-study/growthcds/): A 48-hour emergency website rebuild and a decade-old Google indexing recovery for a national business-networking and events company.
